description_long: This is a freestanding electric oven with a smooth, glass-ceramic cooktop featuring four circular heating zones. The oven has a prominent rectangular front door with a large, centered window for viewing the interior, and a wide, horizontally mounted handle above the door. The control panel is located at the back of the cooktop and includes four large, round knobs and a central rectangular display or label area. The sides and back of the oven are plain and unadorned, with a matte dark finish. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a robust, metallic appearance.
description: A modern freestanding electric oven with a glass-ceramic cooktop, four heating zones, a large front window, and a wide horizontal handle. The control panel features four knobs and a central display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oven door with a large window, a wide horizontal handle, and the control panel with four knobs and a central display above the cooktop.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, flat side panel and a partial view of the cooktop and control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat back panel with no visible controls or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain side panel and partial visibility of the cooktop and control panel.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is a raised rectangular section at the back of the cooktop, featuring four large, round knobs symmetrically arranged, two on each side. In the center is a rectangular display or label area, which is unmarked. The panel is metallic with a simple, uncluttered layout and no visible buttons or touchscreens.
attribute_door_handle_type: The door handle is a wide, horizontally mounted bar that spans most of the oven door's width. It is slightly protruding, appears metallic or plastic with a dark finish, and is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping.
attribute_window_presence: present, a large rectangular window is centered on the oven door, occupying most of its upper half.
